data.title: Business services industry in Europe is vital; 40M employed, contributing EUR 3.5 trillion to economy.
data.description: In Brussels on October 2, 2025, it was reported that the business services industry in Europe has become a significant economic force, playing a crucial role as both a global shock absorber and a strategic enabler for long-term transformation. Approximately 40 million individuals are employed in this sector across Europe, collectively generating a substantial contribution of EUR 3.5 trillion to the economy.

data.title: AIxMed and Biopticka Laboratoř partner to advance AI cytology in Europe. MOU signed on Oct. 2, 2025.
data.description: In Santa Clara, California on October 2, 2025, a significant agreement was made between AIxMed Inc., a prominent company in computational cytology and AI-driven diagnostics, and Biopticka Laboratoř s.r.o., the top private reference laboratory in the Czech Republic. The Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) signed between the two parties marks a noteworthy collaboration in the field.

data.title: Jiuzi Holdings, Inc. plans $30M private placement for cryptocurrency acquisition from non-U.S. investors.
data.description: In Hangzhou, China on October 2, 2025, Jiuzi Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: JZXN) revealed it has engaged in securities purchase deals with select non-U.S. institutional investors for a private placement offering aiming to generate up to US$30 million in gross proceeds.

data.title: Dr. Soonho Ahn appointed to Elevated Materials Board of Directors, enhancing technical leadership in battery solutions.
data.description: A well-known battery innovator will be aiding Elevated Materials in their upcoming phase of expansion and business implementation. Based in Santa Clara, California, on October 2, 2025, Elevated Materials, a top player in cutting-edge battery technologies, revealed the addition of Dr. Soonho Ahn to their team.

data.title: Catherine Clay appointed CEO of S&P Dow Jones Indices, Dan Draper to step down but remain as Special Advisor post Nov 1, 2025.
data.description: Catherine Clay has been named the new CEO of S&P Dow Jones Indices, while Dan Draper will be stepping down from the position and transitioning to a role as a Special Advisor. This change is scheduled to take effect from November 1, 2025. S&P DJI, a prominent index provider globally, announced the leadership shift in New York on October 2, 2025.

data.title: Evertec appoints Joaquin Castrillo as COO, starting Nov 1, 2025. He will report to CEO Mac Schuessler.
data.description: In San Juan, Puerto Rico, Evertec, Inc. (NYSE: EVTC) has named Joaquin Castrillo as the new Senior Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer (COO), starting from November 1, 2025. Reporting directly to Evertec's President and CEO Mac Schuessler, Castrillo will oversee all commercial areas of the company with a focus on revenue and management. This strategic appointment aims to enhance Evertec's operational efficiency and strengthen its leadership team.

data.title: Evertec acquires controlling stake in Tecnobank in Brazil. Expands product offerings in digital financing sector. - 131 characters
data.description: In Puerto Rico, Evertec, Inc. (NYSE: EVTC) has successfully completed the acquisition of a majority share in Tecnobank Tecnologia Bancária S.A., a prominent fintech provider in Brazil's digital vehicle financing contract registration field. The transaction was finalized through Evertec's wholly-owned subsidiary, Evertec Brasil Informática S.A. This move marks an important step for the Company, solidifying its position in the Brazilian market. The acquisition aims to enhance Evertec's presence in the digital finance sector and leverage Tecnobank's expertise.

data.title: Costamare Inc. elected 2 Class III directors at the 2025 annual meeting of stockholders. .
data.description: On October 2, 2025, Costamare Inc., a global containership owner and charter provider trading on the NYSE under the symbol CMRE, disclosed the appointment of two Class III directors during its virtual annual stockholders meeting.

data.title: Anavex Life Sciences creates once-daily oral tablet for ANAVEX®3-71 program. Trial hits primary endpoint, proving safety in male and female adults.
data.description: The ANAVEX3-71-002 trial successfully met its primary goal by showing safety and tolerance in a wide demographic, including male and female adults.

data.title: Alterity Therapeutics to present at 2025 Parkinson's Disease congress with data from ATH434-201 Phase 2 trial.
data.description: Information from the double-blind Phase 2 trial ATH434-201 will be highlighted in both an oral session and several poster presentations. This data contains key findings and results from the trial, contributing important insights for further research and potential future therapies. Attendees can expect to gain a deeper understanding of the trial outcomes through the presentations, which will include significant numbers and statistics pertaining to the study.

data.title: Bombardier's Global 7500 Jet sets 150th speed record, achieving speeds over 1,000 km/hr on 20 missions, breaking industry records.
data.description: In a press release today, Bombardier revealed that their Global 7500 business jet has achieved an impressive feat by setting its 150th speed record, surpassing all other business aircraft types. This high-performing jet has attained speed records for major city pairs like Tokyo to Los Angeles, Toronto to Paris, New York to London, and Hong Kong to Montreal. On 20 of these missions, the aircraft maintained an average speed exceeding 1,000 km/hr, ensuring swift travel for passengers. This remarkable achievement solidifies the Global 7500's reputation as a leader in the industry for speed and efficiency.

data.title: Costamare Inc. declares dividends on its preferred stocks: $0.476563 for Series B, $0.531250 for Series C, and $0.546875 for Series D.
data.description: Costamare Inc. (NYSE: CMRE) announced on October 2, 2025, that they will be paying cash dividends for their preferred stocks. The dividends declared are US $0.476563 per share for the 7.625% Series B Preferred Stock (NYSE: CMRE PR B), US $0.531250 per share for the 8.50% Series C Preferred Stock (NYSE: CMRE PR C), and US $0.546875 per share for the 8.75% Series D Preferred Stock (NYSE: CMRE PR D). These dividends cover the period from July 15, 2025, to October 14, 2025, and will be disbursed on October 15, 2025, to shareholders holding these preferred stocks as of the record date, which is October 14, 2025.

data.title: BeyondTrucks integrates AI into TMS platform, improving productivity and efficiency for enterprise fleets. Oct. 2, 2025.
data.description: In San Francisco on October 2, 2025, BeyondTrucks unveiled their transportation management system (TMS) aimed at boosting efficiency. This system is designed to replace outdated legacy software and manual processes for enterprise fleets. Integration will lead to enhanced productivity and operational efficiency in managing technology.

data.title: Weak ADP report shows US private payrolls dropped by 32,000 jobs in Sep vs expected gain of 51,000, driven by small/medium businesses. Fears of recession rise amid BLS shutdown.
data.description: An unexpected downturn in the private sector jobs market has sparked concerns of a looming economic recession, amid an ongoing government shutdown. The latest ADP Employment report revealed a surprising loss of 32,000 jobs in September, contrary to the anticipated gain of 51,000. The decline was concentrated in small and medium-sized businesses, painting a worrisome picture of the U.S. economy. With the Bureau of Labor Statistics withholding data due to the shutdown, the ADP report has gained significant influence, noted by Bill Adams, Chief Economist at Comerica Bank. Economist David Rosenberg, head of Rosenberg Research & Associates Inc., highlighted on X that recession chances are higher than the market assumes. The absence of BLS data has magnified the importance of private-sector reports like ADP. These developments signal a potential economic slowdown as noted by experts in the industry. More details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: BMC highlights latest innovations at ERS 2025 in Amsterdam, focusing on better patient care.
data.description: At the European Respiratory Society (ERS) International Congress 2025 in Amsterdam, BMC Medical, a renowned company specializing in sleep and respiratory solutions, presented its newest advancements. The event highlighted BMC's commitment to improving patient care through innovation. The congress attracted a large audience, with over 1,000 attendees participating in the showcase of BMC's latest products and technologies.

data.title: 7-Eleven's Laredo Taco Company offers BOGO lunch tacos and breakfast deals to celebrate National Taco Day on October 7.
data.description: Celebrate National Taco Day on October 7 with exciting offers from 7-Eleven, Inc.'s Laredo Taco Company® restaurants! Fans can enjoy BOGO lunch tacos and irresistible breakfast deals on this special day. Located in Irving, Texas, these restaurants are making it a taco lover's dream come true with their delicious offerings. Don't miss out on this opportunity to indulge in mouthwatering tacos and start your day off right with these crave-worthy deals.
